package_info:
Name: text-utils
Version: 1.2.0
Summary: Pure Python text processing utilities
Home-page: https://github.com/example/text-utils
License: MIT
Requires-Python: >=3.9
Modules: text_utils
Key functions: clean_text(), tokenize(), normalize()
analysis: Simple pure-Python package. Main module: text_utils. Key functions: clean_text(str) -> str, tokenize(str) -> list[str], normalize(str) -> str. No optional dependencies. No C extensions.
jira_context: Create probe tests for text-utils. Basic import and function tests needed.
